content.summary: Carmatch (com.grandgames.carmatch) Auto-detected UX parameters parameters extracted by AI Tester observation.

design_analysis.design_intent: Extract auto-detected ux parameters design parameters from Carmatch via automated observation.
design_analysis.context: External game observation without source code access. Parameters estimated via ADB screenshots + pixel analysis + OCR.
strengths: Direct observation from live game build
concerns: No source code access limits parameter accuracy (~85-89%)
Some parameters require extended play sessions
OCR-dependent values may have recognition errors
design_analysis.reasoning: Puzzle genre entry in Design DB. Carmatch provides baseline auto-detected ux parameters data.
